description: Analyze a crystal structure with pymatgen — composition/formula, lattice parameters, density, space group / symmetry, and coordination environment — and export structured results to JSON.
rules: read-only — reads one structure file, computes properties, writes a report
structured results exported to analysis.json under record_store; human-readable log to analyze.log
requires pymatgen present for real analysis; degrades gracefully (records missing dep, exits 0) when absent
usage: Set STRUCTURE_FILE (path to a CIF / POSCAR / etc.). Outputs: analyze.log (human-readable) and analysis.json (structured) under record_store.
limitation: Real output needs pymatgen installed; without it the porter writes a graceful stub and a missing-dependency note. Coordination/symmetry sections fall back silently if individual analyses fail.
